name: Bhai Mangal Singh (Delhi)
body: Bhai Mangal Singh Ji was the son of renowned puratan Raagi, Bhai Santa Singh Ji of Delhi. Having learned from his father, Bhai Mangal Singh Ji was very talented and he trained many students of his own including Bhai Gurdial Singh Rasia. Currently, his son, Bhai Manohar Singh Ji is continuing this legacy and performs Kirtan in many of the Gurdwaras in Delhi. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Mangal Singh Ji, please contact us.
